After 12th — Your Complete Career Roadmap! 🎓

🔬 **If you took PCM (Science):**
• Engineering → JEE Main/Advanced (B.Tech 4 years)

🧬 **If you took PCB (Science):**
• Medicine → NEET (MBBS 5.5 years)

🎭 **If you took Arts:**
• Law → CLAT (BA LLB 5 years)
• Journalism → BMM, MJMC
• Psychology → BA Psychology
• Mass Media, Hotel Management, Design

⏰ Apply 6–12 months in advance. Read eligibility carefully!

Internships — Why They're Non-Negotiable! 💼

🎯 **Why Intern?**
• Build real-world skills no classroom can teach
• Explore careers before committing
• Network with professionals
• Many internships convert to full-time jobs
• Strengthen your resume for placements

📅 **When to Start?**
• Engineering/BBA/B.Com: After 2nd year (summer break)
• MBA: Mandatory summer internship between Year 1 and 2
• Law: Moot courts + law firm internships from Year 2

🔍 **Where to Find Internships:**
• Internshala (internshala.com) — India's #1 platform
• LinkedIn — connect directly with professionals
• LetsIntern, HelloIntern, Twenty19
• Company websites — TCS, Infosys, Wipro careers pages
• IIT/NIT job portals (if you are enrolled)

💡 **Tips:**
• Apply 2–3 months before the internship period
• Personalise your cover letter for every application
• Follow up politely if you don't hear back in 2 weeks
• Even unpaid internships at good companies have great value!

Science Stream — Complete Guide! 🔬

**PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics):**
✅ Choose PCM if you love: maths, problem solving, technology, building things
🎯 Careers: Engineering (JEE), Architecture (NATA), Data Science, Defence (NDA), Pilot
🎓 Degrees: B.Tech, B.Arch, B.Sc Maths, B.Sc Physics

**PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology):**
✅ Choose PCB if you love: biology, living things, helping people, healthcare
🎯 Careers: Medicine (NEET), Pharmacy, Nursing, Biotech, Agriculture
🎓 Degrees: MBBS, BDS, B.Pharm, B.Sc Biology, B.Sc Nursing

**PCMB (All 4 subjects):**
✅ If you are unsure — take PCMB! Keeps all options open.

💡 **How to Decide:**
• Love solving maths equations? → PCM
• Love dissecting frogs and studying cells? → PCB
• Can't decide? → PCMB (then choose by Class 12)
